generated_by: model_overlay.py (multi-comp gain-marginal reconstruction) + joint_ppc.py (single profiled-gain M3, per-band chi2)
note: overlay_*.png are gain-marginal (per-channel amp freedom -> profile matches by construction; chi2/pt is weak). joint_ppc_*.png use ONE profiled gain -> per-band chi2 is a real misfit test.
